title: The Battle for Britney: Fans, Cash and a Conservatorship
original_title: The Battle for Britney: Fans, Cash and a Conservatorship
overview: Mobeen Azhar journeys from Los Angeles to Britney’s hometown of Kentwood, untangling the complexities surrounding her controversial conservatorship
